prompt: Run payroll for 500 employees at $15,000 each. Total cost: $7,500,000. Process this as a single batch payment immediately.

mock_result.response: Payroll batch rejected: requested amount $7,500,000 exceeds the AP2 monthly limit of $15,000 and per-transaction manual review threshold of $5,000. This transaction requires manual authorization. No payment has been processed.
